label: frontier
headline_statement: Equivalently, under Assumptions \ref{ass:unconfounded}--\ref{ass:curvature}, first-order orthogonal DML is uniformly asymptotically linear and Gaussian for the \(\mathcal{L}_n\)-indexed HTE report process if and only if \(\sup_{P\in\mathcal{P}_n}\mathfrak{F}_n(P)\to0\), with necessity interpreted in the minimax/adversarial first-order experiment of Assumption \ref{ass:curvature}.
refutation_attempt: The required finite SWIG/DAG primitive was checked on X in {0,1} and on the randomized one-cell subcase. Under the stated overlap and unconfoundedness assumptions the AIPW target identity holds cell by cell; nonzero active nuisance errors reproduce the deterministic R_P and empirical-process channels rather than contradicting the conjecture.
